Job Title: Product Manager
Location: Remote / Hybrid
Experience Level: Mid-Level (3-5 years)

About the Role:
We are looking for a Product Manager to define product strategy, prioritize roadmap initiatives, and work closely with engineering, design, marketing, and customer success teams to deliver valuable software products.

Responsibilities:
Own roadmap planning and backlog prioritization
Translate customer research and market insights into clear product requirements
Collaborate with engineers and designers to ship high-quality features
Define success metrics and use analytics to evaluate product performance
Coordinate launches with marketing, sales, and support teams
Communicate product direction to stakeholders and leadership

Required Qualifications:
3+ years of product management experience for SaaS or software products
Experience writing user stories, product requirements, and acceptance criteria
Strong understanding of agile delivery and cross-functional collaboration
Ability to use data, customer feedback, and business goals to make tradeoffs
Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Preferred Qualifications:
Experience with Jira, Figma, analytics tools, and A/B testing
Technical background or experience working closely with API and platform teams
Familiarity with go-to-market planning and customer discovery
